top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.Diagnosis = 'normal anti-scl70';

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.`aCL IgG` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgM` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgA` IS NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.Diagnosis = 'normal anti-scl70';

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.`aCL IgG` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgM` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgA` IS NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.`aCL IgG` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgM` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgA` IS NULL
  AND e.`Diagnosis` LIKE '%normal%';

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.Diagnosis = 'normal anti-scl70';

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e

WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.`aCL IgG` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgM` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgA` IS NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID

  AND e.`aCL IgG` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgM` IS NULL
  AND e.`aCL IgA` IS NULL
  AND e.`Diagnosis` LIKE '%normal%';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
WHERE e.`Examination Date` > '1997-01-01'
  AND e.Diagnosis = 'normal anti-scl70';
